text_block_list.text:
I escort Seiun Sky to the infirmary after she
suffers an injury while training.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's not a big deal, sheesh.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
An injury like this is nothing to sweat over. It'll
heal right up with just a bandage or something.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But if you're so worried, maybe we ought to call
off the rest of today's training, huh?
choice_data_list: Let's take it easy for a while!

If your injury's as small as you say, why not
continue?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What? I mean, you can tell me to sit still, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're asking for a lot trying to pin me down in
one spot, y'know? I'm like a cloud, I go wherever
the wind blows.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm, what do you think we should do?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I've got it. If I have to behave myself, then
you have to take care of me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be expecting flawless bedside manner from
you till I'm back in shipshape. ♪

Agreeing to Seiun Sky's various self-serving
terms, I nurse her back to health.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow, you're not worried about my well-being...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You got me. I did say the injury wasn't bad
enough to warrant needing rest.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I'll be in serious trouble if training makes it
worse...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think you should just trust me, and let
me do what I want?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I don't like being forced to stay put, and
there's no way I'm gonna waste this incredible
opportunity to slack off.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Running Late
text_block_list.text:
Oh man! I'm gonna be late for practice! Outta my
waaay!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Gyaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Owww! Urgh, I think my injury just got worse!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think you should just trust me, and let
me do what I want?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I did wangle my way out of that conversation with
Trainer pretty smoothly...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But no one knows my body better than me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, doing what I want, when I want like always is
definitely gonna be the shortest path to recovery.

Seiun Sky's relaxed recovery restores her to good
health before long, and she's soon back to
training again.
